recap:
- Prepare a dataset for training or testing the model.
- Develop a pipeline using Huggingface/transformer LLM for processing data.
- Apply the pipeline to the dataset and log the results using MLflow Tracking.
- Register the pipeline as an MLflow Model in the MLflow Tracking server.
- Load the LLM pipeline from the registry to perform batch inference.
- Utilize SQL `ai_query()` for batch inference on supported Foundation Models API models.
